overview.short: Rasalgad is a fort in the Maharashtra state of India.
overview.description: Rasalgad is a fort in the Maharashtra state of India. It lies 15 km east of Khed City. The fort has been developed as a tourist attraction. Its fortification is in good condition.

topPlaces.name: Wadi-jaitapur
topPlaces.description: Wadi-jaitapur is a small village in Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra state in Western India. The 2011 census of India recorded a total of 289 residents in the village.

topPlaces.name: Shiravali
topPlaces.description: Shiravali is a small village in Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra state in Western India. The 2011 Census of India recorded a total of 867 residents in the village.

topPlaces.name: Sukivali
topPlaces.description: Sukivali is a small village in Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra state in Western India. The 2011 Census of India recorded a total of 2,196 residents in the village.

items.note: Wadi-jaitapur is a small village in Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra state in Western India. The 2011 census of India recorded a total of 289 residents in the village.
Shiravali is a small village in Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra state in Western India. The 2011 Census of India recorded a total of 867 residents in the village.
Sukivali is a small village in Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra state in Western India. The 2011 Census of India recorded a total of 2,196 residents in the village.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rasalgad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rasalgad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Pune Airport (101 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (93 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rasalgad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rasalgad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rasalgad?
faq.a: Stays in Rasalgad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rasalgad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Wadi-jaitapur, Shiravali, Sukivali.
